record.field: <form string="Pay"><field name="line_ids" invisible="1"/><field name="can_edit_wizard" invisible="1"/><field name="can_group_payments" invisible="1"/><field name="payment_type" invisible="1"/><field name="partner_type" invisible="1"/><field name="source_amount" invisible="1"/><field name="source_amount_currency" invisible="1"/><field name="source_currency_id" invisible="1"/><field name="company_id" invisible="1"/><field name="partner_id" invisible="1"/><field name="available_journal_ids" invisible="1"/><field name="available_payment_method_line_ids" invisible="1"/><group><group><field name="journal_id" required="1"/><field name="payment_method_line_id"/><field name="partner_bank_id"/><field name="group_payment"/><field name="payment_difference"/><field name="payment_difference_handling"/><field name="writeoff_account_id"/><field name="writeoff_label"/></group><group><field name="amount" required="1"/><field name="currency_id"/><field name="payment_date" required="1"/><field name="communication"/></group></group><footer><button string="Create Payments" name="action_create_payments" type="object" class="oe_highlight"/><button string="Discard" special="cancel" class="btn-secondary"/></footer></form>
